edit-config.config:
${cc\-name}-NETWORK-VSI bbfift:vlan-sub-interface
network-port
<#if network\-port\-name?has_content>
${network\-port\-name}
</#if> true
false
l2cp-pass-00-02to0f-10-2x
<#if i\-vlan\-id?has_content> CC-QINQ-VLAN-PROFILE
${o\-vlan\-id}
${i\-vlan\-id}
<#else> CC-SINGLE-VLAN-PROFILE
${o\-vlan\-id}
</#if> <#if network\-vsi\-egress\-qos\-policy\-profile?has_content> ${network\-vsi\-egress\-qos\-policy\-profile} </#if> <#if network\-vsi\-ingress\-qos\-policy\-profile?has_content> ${network\-vsi\-ingress\-qos\-policy\-profile} </#if>
${cc\-name}-USER-VSI bbfift:vlan-sub-interface ${vector\-of\-data\-name}
${enet\-name}
<#if performance\-enable?has_content>
${performance\-enable}
</#if> ${frame\-processing\-profiles\-name} <#if egress\-qos\-policy\-profile\-name?has_content> ${egress\-qos\-policy\-profile\-name} </#if> <#if ingress\-qos\-policy\-profile\-name?has_content> ${ingress\-qos\-policy\-profile\-name} </#if> <#if olt\-infrastructure\-name?has_content && leaf\-scheduler\-name?has_content>
${olt\-infrastructure\-name}-cpartition ${leaf\-scheduler\-name}
</#if>
<#if ip\-anti\-spoofing?has_content && ip\-anti\-spoofing && ip\-anti\-spoofing\-statistics?has_content && ip\-anti\-spoofing\-statistics>
${cc\-name}-USER-VSI
</#if>
<#if (gemport\-sharing?has_content && gemport\-sharing == false) || (!gemport\-sharing?has_content)>
<#if tc0\-gemport\-id?has_content>
${cc\-name}-GEM0 ${cc\-name}-USER-VSI 0 ${tc0\-gemport\-id} <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc1\-gemport\-id?has_content>
${cc\-name}-GEM1 ${cc\-name}-USER-VSI 1 ${tc1\-gemport\-id} <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc2\-gemport\-id?has_content>
${cc\-name}-GEM2 ${cc\-name}-USER-VSI 2 ${tc2\-gemport\-id} <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc3\-gemport\-id?has_content>
${cc\-name}-GEM3 ${cc\-name}-USER-VSI 3 ${tc3\-gemport\-id} <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc4\-gemport\-id?has_content>
${cc\-name}-GEM4 ${cc\-name}-USER-VSI 4 ${tc4\-gemport\-id} <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc5\-gemport\-id?has_content>
${cc\-name}-GEM5 ${cc\-name}-USER-VSI 5 ${tc5\-gemport\-id} <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc6\-gemport\-id?has_content>
${cc\-name}-GEM6 ${cc\-name}-USER-VSI 6 ${tc6\-gemport\-id} <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc7\-gemport\-id?has_content>
${cc\-name}-GEM7 ${cc\-name}-USER-VSI 7 ${tc7\-gemport\-id} <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if>
</#if>
${cc\-name}-FWD
${cc\-name}-FWD-USER-PORT ${cc\-name}-USER-VSI
${cc\-name}-FWD-NETWORK-PORT ${cc\-name}-NETWORK-VSI
<#if onu\-template\-cc\-name?has_content && onu\-name?has_content>
${onu\-name}
<#if (gemport\-sharing?has_content && gemport\-sharing == false) || (!gemport\-sharing?has_content)>
<#if tc0\-gemport\-id?has_content>
<#if tc0\-gemport\-set\-name?has_content> ${tc0\-gemport\-set\-name}-${onu\-template\-cc\-name}-GEM0 <#else> ${onu\-template\-cc\-name}-GEM0 </#if> ${tc0\-gemport\-id}
</#if> <#if tc1\-gemport\-id?has_content>
<#if tc1\-gemport\-set\-name?has_content> ${tc1\-gemport\-set\-name}-${onu\-template\-cc\-name}-GEM1 <#else> ${onu\-template\-cc\-name}-GEM1 </#if> ${tc1\-gemport\-id}
</#if> <#if tc2\-gemport\-id?has_content>
<#if tc2\-gemport\-set\-name?has_content> ${tc2\-gemport\-set\-name}-${onu\-template\-cc\-name}-GEM2 <#else> ${onu\-template\-cc\-name}-GEM2 </#if> ${tc2\-gemport\-id}
</#if> <#if tc3\-gemport\-id?has_content>
<#if tc3\-gemport\-set\-name?has_content> ${tc3\-gemport\-set\-name}-${onu\-template\-cc\-name}-GEM3 <#else> ${onu\-template\-cc\-name}-GEM3 </#if> ${tc3\-gemport\-id}
</#if> <#if tc4\-gemport\-id?has_content>
<#if tc4\-gemport\-set\-name?has_content> ${tc4\-gemport\-set\-name}-${onu\-template\-cc\-name}-GEM4 <#else> ${onu\-template\-cc\-name}-GEM4 </#if> ${tc4\-gemport\-id}
</#if> <#if tc5\-gemport\-id?has_content>
<#if tc5\-gemport\-set\-name?has_content> ${tc5\-gemport\-set\-name}-${onu\-template\-cc\-name}-GEM5 <#else> ${onu\-template\-cc\-name}-GEM5 </#if> ${tc5\-gemport\-id}
</#if> <#if tc6\-gemport\-id?has_content>
<#if tc6\-gemport\-set\-name?has_content> ${tc6\-gemport\-set\-name}-${onu\-template\-cc\-name}-GEM6 <#else> ${onu\-template\-cc\-name}-GEM6 </#if> ${tc6\-gemport\-id}
</#if> <#if tc7\-gemport\-id?has_content>
<#if tc7\-gemport\-set\-name?has_content> ${tc7\-gemport\-set\-name}-${onu\-template\-cc\-name}-GEM7 <#else> ${onu\-template\-cc\-name}-GEM7 </#if> ${tc7\-gemport\-id}
</#if>
</#if> <#if onu\-template\-instantiate\-tagged?has_content || onu\-template\-instantiate\-untagged?has_content || onu\-template\-instantiate\-prio\-tagged?has_content>
${onu\-template\-cc\-name}
<#if onu\-template\-instantiate\-tagged?has_content && onu\-template\-instantiate\-tagged> rule_TAGGED </#if> <#if onu\-template\-instantiate\-untagged?has_content && onu\-template\-instantiate\-untagged > rule_UNTAGGED </#if> <#if onu\-template\-instantiate\-prio\-tagged?has_content && onu\-template\-instantiate\-prio\-tagged> rule_PRIO_TAGGED </#if> <#if onu\-template\-instantiate\-anyframe?has_content && onu\-template\-instantiate\-anyframe> rule_ANYFRAME </#if> <#if q\-vlan\-id?has_content> ${q\-vlan\-id} </#if> <#if n\-vlan\-id?has_content> ${n\-vlan\-id} </#if>
<#if onu\-ingress\-qos\-policy\-profile\-name?has_content> ${onu\-ingress\-qos\-policy\-profile\-name} </#if>
</#if>
</#if>
